scene_description:
Foreground:
- A sandy ground surface with visible tire tracks covers the entire lower portion of the image. 
- A blurred, indistinct object is at the very bottom center (typical of the vehicle carrying the Street View camera). 
- On the left edge of the sandy area, a person sits on the ground near a brick wall. 
- A small pile of sand is positioned in the left midground, in front of the brick wall. 

Midground:
- A child stands in the center of the sandy area, wearing a green top and dark lower clothing, holding an object in their hand. 
- A tall solar-powered street lamp is located slightly to the right of center; it has a metal pole, a rectangular solar panel mounted at the top, and a concrete base. 
- A light brown brick wall runs parallel to the left edge of the image, extending from the left foreground into the midground; it is constructed from rectangular blocks. 

Background:
- A small building with a white upper section and blue lower section is visible to the right of the solar lamp; it has a red door. 
- Multiple large green trees are scattered across the background: several stand behind the brick wall on the left, one is near the solar lamp in the center, and more are spread across the right side of the image. 
- In the far background (right side), a low wall and additional trees are visible. 
- The sky occupies the upper portion of the image, with white clouds and patches of blue sky.

details.name: solar lamp
details.reason: The solar panel and concrete base are specific infrastructure features.
details.focused_description: The solar lamp features a tall, cylindrical metallic pole supporting a rectangular solar panel at the top. The solar panel is dark brown or black. The pole is mounted on a square concrete base. The solar panel displays the text "SOLAR" in Latin script. The pole is made of metal, and the panel appears to be intact with no visible damage.

details.name: building
details.reason: The white and blue color scheme with a red door is a distinctive architectural feature.
details.focused_description: The building is a single-story rectangular structure with two-tone walls (upper section light gray, lower section light blue). It has a sloped, light gray metal roof. A brown door is centered on the front facade. The walls appear weathered, with visible wear. No visible text.

details.name: brick wall
details.reason: The construction and color of the brick wall can be a regional clue.
details.focused_description: The brick wall is composed of light beige rectangular bricks arranged in a horizontal pattern. It features vertical concrete sections at regular intervals. The wall's surface is uniform, with a slightly textured finish from the brick material. The bricks appear to be in good condition, showing no visible damage. The overall structure is solid and extends horizontally across the image.
